title: No, Not One!
abc_source:
X: 172
T: No, Not One!
%%combinevoices 1
C: Words: Johnson Oatman, Jr, 1894.
C: Music: 'No, Not One' George Crawford Hugg, 1894.  Setting: "Pentecostal Hymns, No. 2", 1894.
C: copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2012 Revision.
S: Music source: "Pentecostal Hymns, No. 2" 1898 page 1.   Setting and hymn identical to that found in "Pentecostal Hymns, Nos. 1 and 2 combined", 1894 Hymn 305.  ABC file contributed to the Open Hymnal by Samuel Cantrell, 18 Jan 2012.
S: not sure about first printing of this hymn; 1894 is earliest verifiable source.  Hugg owned the copyright.  Hugg printed hymnals in 1862, 1879, and 1892.  Suspect hymn is found in one of them.

w: 5.~Was e'er a gift like the Sav- ior giv- en? No, not one! no, not one!

metadata.composer: 'No, Not One' George Crawford Hugg, 1894 "Pentecostal Hymns, No. 2", 1894
metadata.copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2012 Revision.
c_lines: Music: 'No, Not One' George Crawford Hugg, 1894.  Setting: "Pentecostal Hymns, No. 2", 1894.
copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2012 Revision.

1.raw_text: There's not a friend like the lowly Jesus, No, not one! no, not one! None else could heal all our soul's diseases, No, not one! no, not one! Jesus knows all about our struggles, He will guide till the day is done; There's not a friend like the lowly Jesus, No, not one! no, not one!

2.raw_text: No friend like Him is so high and holy, No, not one! no, not one! And yet no friend is so meek and lowly, No, not one! no, not one! Jesus knows all about our struggles, He will guide till the day is done; There's not a friend like the lowly Jesus, No, not one! no, not one!

3.raw_text: There's not an hour that He is not near us, No, not one! no, not one! No night so dark but His love can cheer us, No, not one! no, not one! Jesus knows all about our struggles, He will guide till the day is done; There's not a friend like the lowly Jesus, No, not one! no, not one!

4.raw_text: Did ever saint find this friend forsake him? No, not one! no, not one! Or sinner find that He would not take him? No, not one! no, not one! Jesus knows all about our struggles, He will guide till the day is done; There's not a friend like the lowly Jesus, No, not one! no, not one!

5.raw_text: Was e'er a gift like the Savior given? No, not one! no, not one! Will He refuse us a home in heaven? No, not one! no, not one! Jesus knows all about our struggles, He will guide till the day is done; There's not a friend like the lowly Jesus, No, not one! no, not one!
